## Privacy / Evidence Boundary

- [ ] No raw WeChat exports, private PDFs, screenshots, addresses, phone numbers, serial numbers, or local runtime state are included.
- [ ] No API keys or local secret files are included.
- [ ] Changes keep the final direction: Rokid glasses spatial memory layer over a real campus exhibition wall, with Windows localhost/LAN first and Rokid hardware replacing only input/display later.
